subject: Flaaffy, a pink bipedal sheep Pokemon with patches of white wool and a yellow-tipped tail
description: A pink bipedal sheep Pokemon stands in a warm, sunlit scene dominated by golden-yellow tones. The creature has smooth pink skin with tufts of fluffy white wool on its body and a round tail ending in a yellow sphere. Its posture is relaxed and upright, facing roughly three-quarter toward the viewer. The background is bright and warm with amber and yellow hues suggesting open outdoor space in daylight.
foreground: pink bipedal sheep Pokemon with white wool patches and a yellow-orb tail
